case_title: PANTELIS, PANAGIOTIS vs. PACIFIC WEST COFFEE COMPANY, A CORP. DBA OH-LA-LA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANTELIS, PANAGIOTIS AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC WEST COFFEE COMPANY, A CORP. DBA OH-LA-LA
